message:
fix(storage): improve migration error messages with contextual details

Replaces generic error.to_string() messages in the table rebuild/
migration path with contextual format strings that include the table
name and operation being performed. Each migration step (index
introspection, temp table creation, data copy, index drop, table
drop, rename, index recreation) now names the specific table/index
that failed, making migration failures diagnosable without enabling
trace logging.

Also changes DROP TABLE to DROP TABLE IF EXISTS for the original
table during rebuild, preventing spurious errors if a prior
interrupted migration already dropped it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
